findings.title: Redis port open to internet
findings.description: Security group allows inbound traffic from 0.0.0.0/0 on port 6379 (Redis). Database and cache ports must be restricted to VPC CIDR only.

findings.title: EBS volume without encryption at rest
findings.description: EBS volume vol-0xyz789abc123def0 does not have encryption at rest enabled. All block storage must be encrypted to protect data at rest.
